/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libc1_driver__rosidl_typesupport_c.so -o libc1_driver__rosidl_typesupport_c.so CMakeFiles/c1_driver__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/c1_driver/msg/velinfo__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/c1_driver__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/c1_driver/msg/velquery__type_support.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/doanh/atlas_c1/build/c1_driver:/opt/ros/humble/lib: libc1_driver__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/humble/lib
